summary: Scaffolded src/pages/Create.tsx with 6 useState hooks (title='', date='', emoji='🎂', color='violet', submitting=false, error=null), useNavigate, full-page card layout (min-h-screen bg-slate-950 / max-w-md bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl p-6), heading 'New Countdown', and placeholder comment sections for TitleInput, DatePicker, EmojiPicker, ColorPicker, ErrorBanner, SubmitButton. No onChange handlers, no submit logic, no Supabase calls.
next_actions: Wire TitleInput section with controlled input and onChange for title state
Wire DatePicker section with controlled input and onChange for date state
Wire EmojiPicker section using EmojiSelector component with emoji/setEmoji
Wire ColorPicker section with color swatches and setColor
Wire ErrorBanner section to display error state
Wire SubmitButton with handleSubmit, submitting state, and Supabase insertCountdown call
